# Upgrade Plan

## Overview
This plan upgrades the Java project to the latest Long-Term Support (LTS) versions, including Java 21 and Spring Boot 3.4.

## Objectives
- Upgrade to Java 21 LTS for improved performance, security, and access to modern language features
- Migrate to Spring Boot 3.4 with Spring Framework 6.x for enhanced functionality and long-term support
- Update all dependencies to their latest compatible versions
- Ensure javax.* to jakarta.* namespace migration is completed
- Maintain application functionality and passing tests throughout the upgrade process

## Tasks
See **tasks.json** for the detailed task breakdown and execution plan.

## Key Upgrade Highlights
- **Java 21**: Latest LTS version with virtual threads, pattern matching, and performance improvements
- **Spring Boot 3.4**: Modern Spring ecosystem with Jakarta EE 10 support
- **Dependency Updates**: Latest compatible versions with security patches and bug fixes
